snippet.matrix.label: Matrix
snippet.typeIota.label: Type Iota
snippet.strPrefix.label: String Prefix
plugin.matrix.doc: Matrix with row & col followed by all numbers row-by-row. Example: matrix_2_2_1_0_0_1
plugin.matrixAlias.doc: Short alias for matrix_. Same format.
plugin.iotaType.doc: Iota type by ID (MoreIotas/Hexal). Namespace hexcasting: can be omitted.
plugin.entityType.doc: Entity type by ID. Namespace minecraft: can be omitted.
plugin.itemType.doc: Item type by ID. Namespace minecraft: can be omitted.
plugin.blockType.doc: Block type by ID. Namespace minecraft: can be omitted.
plugin.str.doc: String literal via str_ prefix. No spaces/escaping supported.
